title: CHEF ROYALE 50 Disposable Clear Plastic Glasses - Recyclable - CE Marked - Full Pint (660ml) for Large Events and Parties (Pack of 50)
features: 𝗘𝗹𝗲𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗬𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗘𝘃𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗘𝗹𝗲𝗴𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 : Step into a world of sophistication and style with CHEF ROYALE's Plastic Full Pint Disposable Clear Cups. Carefully designed, CE marked leave a lasting impression on any gathering, these cups redefine upscale drink service.

𝐄𝐧𝐣𝐨𝐲 𝐄𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲 𝐒𝐢𝐩 𝐭𝐨 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐅𝐮𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐭: Simplify hosting without compromising on flair. Our 660ml, 20oz full pint cups strike the perfect equilibrium between ample capacity and easy handling. Guests can relish each sip without the constant need for refills, letting you enjoy the event as much as they do.

𝗔𝗹𝗹-𝗢𝗰𝗰𝗮𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗺 : From lively beer nights to heartwarming family events, these disposable beer glasses effortlessly adapt to any ambiance. The crystal-clear clarity not only showcases the vibrant colors of beverages but also adds a touch of refined style to your gatherings, enhancing their visual appeal.

𝗦𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗥𝗲𝗱𝗲𝗳𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗱, 𝗖𝗲𝗹𝗲𝗯𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗮𝗳𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗖𝗲𝗹𝗲𝗯𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 : Embrace the conscious choice with our recyclable plastic cups. Unlike conventional disposables, our cups can be effortlessly washed and reused, translating to a considerable reduction in waste. By opting for this eco-friendly approach, you contribute to a greener environment, all while hosting your unforgettable events.

𝗨𝗻𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗰𝗵𝗲𝗱 𝗩𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗨𝗻𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗴𝗲𝘁𝘁𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗠𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀 : Secure the spotlight at every event with our generous pack of 50 full pint cups. These clear plastic cups stand as more than just vessels; they symbolize your commitment to providing quality and elegance in every setting. Whether it's a casual gathering or a grand celebration, choose CHEF ROYALE for an unmatched experience that elevates any festivity.
